# Project Guidelines

## Code Style
Use C# coding standards with Visual Studio defaults. Follow .NET naming conventions (PascalCase for classes, camelCase for variables).

## Architecture
Follow MVC pattern: Models for data, Views for UI, Controllers for logic. Maintain separation of concerns.

## Build and Test
- Build: `dotnet build`
- Test: `dotnet test`
- Run: `dotnet run`

## Conventions
Follow .NET clean code principles: meaningful names, small methods, DRY, SOLID principles.
Support for Bengali, English, and Hindi languages in the application.
